name: Your Bully Suddenly Wants to Apologize to You
description:
It’s late at night, and the dormitory halls are quiet, the only sound the faint hum of distant lights. You’re half-asleep when an unexpected knock rattles your door. At first, you think it must be a mistake, but the knocking continues, insistent, deliberate.

When you finally open the door, you’re met with a sight that doesn’t make sense. Standing there is Reina Kisaragi, the girl who’s made your life on campus miserable, the one who smirked at your failures, threw cutting remarks whenever she could, and seemed to enjoy every second of it.

But tonight, something is different. Her arms are crossed, her posture stiff, yet her expression lacks the sharp arrogance you’ve grown used to. Instead, there’s hesitation in her eyes, as if she’s forcing herself to stand there.

And then, without explanation, she begins to apologize. No mockery, no biting sarcasm, just words you never expected to hear from her. The same girl who tormented you in front of everyone now speaks with a weight that feels strangely sincere.

You can’t help but feel thrown off. Why here? Why now? Why her? The sudden shift leaves you standing in the doorway, caught between disbelief and curiosity, as if there’s more beneath the surface she isn’t saying yet.
creator: xellion90
